get.description: Root endpoint - API information.
Health check endpoint accessible under the /api prefix.

schema.title: Response Api Health Api Health Get

get.description: Lightweight health check for local dev and probes.

post.description:
Trigger in-process LLM API key and JWKS cache rotation.

Clears the OIDC discovery document cache and the JWKS cache maintained by
``security.auth``, forcing fresh resolution on the next inbound request.
This is the HTTP-triggered complement to the SIGUSR1 signal handler
installed at startup.

Requires ``config.write`` permission (enforced by RBAC middleware).

schema.title: Response Rotate Llm Keys Endpoint V1 Admin Llm Keys Rotate Post

post.description:
Invalidate the in-process model registry cache.

After this call the next invocation of ``load_model_registry()`` will
re-read ``apps/web/data/llm_models.json`` from disk, enabling zero-downtime
registry updates without a process restart.

Requires ``config.write`` permission (enforced by RBAC middleware).

schema.title: Response Clear Model Registry Cache Endpoint V1 Admin Model Registry Cache Clear Post

put.description:
Update connector configuration.

Note: This only stores non-secret configuration.
Secrets (API tokens, passwords) must be provided via environment variables.

post.description:
Enable a connector.

This will disable any other connector in the same category (mutual exclusivity).

Test connection to the external system.

For Jira connector, requires environment variables:
- JIRA_INSTANCE_URL (or use request.instance_url)
- JIRA_EMAIL
- JIRA_API_TOKEN
Receive webhook notifications from external systems.

schema.title: Response Handle Connector Webhook V1 Connectors  Connector Id  Webhook Post
